string.name: EntryAbility_desc
string.value: FTP Server - Share files over WiFi

string.name: permission_network_info
string.value: Used to get the device WiFi IP address to display the FTP server connection address

string.name: permission_internet
string.value: Used to run the FTP server and accept client connections over the local network

string.name: permission_read_media
string.value: Used to read files for FTP download transfers

string.name: permission_write_media
string.value: Used to write files received via FTP upload transfers
